title: Get Withered
description: A simple Witherstorm modpack to help with performance, variety, and content on both the server and client side.
body:
## Get Withered A 1.18.2 Cracker's Wither Storm modpack to help with performance, variety, and content on both the server and client side. [Cracker's Wither Storm Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/crackers-wither-storm-mod). It is a recreation of the Minecraft Story Mode Witherstorm Boss Which slowly consumes the area around it like a black hole, gradually becoming more and more powerful.
Feedback
